headline: Jim Cramer Discusses Salesforce (CRM) & AI
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the 10 Stocks Jim Cramer Talked About & Warned About A Weak Market. Enterprise software provider Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM)’s shares are down by 22.6% year-to-date and by 26% over the past year. BNP Paribas discussed the firm on March 27th as it raised the share price target to $230 […]
